title: Addendum - Sales Tax General Order No. 02 of 2025
text:
Government of Pakistan
Revenue Division
Federal Board of Revenue
****rr
C. No. 1 ( 1 )Secy(ST-Ops)/2022 I ) bob 6-R Islamabad, the 03'd March,2026
Sales Tax General Order No. 02 of2025
(Addend um )
In partial modification of Sales Tax General Order No' 02 of 2025, the
words,.the Commissioner" mentioned in paragraphs (a), (b), and (c) of the aforesaid
Sales Tax General Order shall be substituted with "the Commissioner or the Director
of Intelligence & Investigation (Inland Revenue)", so that the amended paragraphs
shall read as follows:
(a) Inquiry shall not be initiated unless approval fiom the
Commissioner or the Director of Intelligence & Investigation
(Inland Revenue) has been obtained;
(b) After conclusion of inquiry, the Commissioner or the Director of
Intelligence & Investigation (Inland Revenue) shall not give
approval to initiate investigation unless he has obtained approval
from the Member (lnland Revenue Operations) of the Board;
(c) Before seeking approval of the Member (Inland Revenue
Operations), it is binding upon the Commissioner or the Director of
Intelligence & Investigation (lnland Revenue) to make consultation
with two representatives of the business community from amongst
such representatives as notified by the Board;
2. All other contents of the Sales Tax General Order No'02 of 2025 shatl
remain unchanged.
(Nal raf )
Secretary (Sales Operati )
Distribution:
l. SA to Chairman. FBR.
ii. Chief Commissioners-lR, LTOs/MTO/CTOs/RTOs.
iii. Webmaster, FBR (HQ). Islamabad lbr uploading.
